title: Mounjaro-maker inks $2.7B deal to speed up AI drug discovery
description: US pharmaceutical giant Eli Lilly has signed a massive $2.75 billion deal with Hong Kong-listed biotech firm Insilico Medicine.

title: OpenClaw Craze Is Driving Next Phase of AI Development, Insiders Say
description: The meteoric rise of open-source artificial intelligence (AI) agent OpenClaw is forcing a reset across the industry as developers strive to build viable monetization models and new infrastructure for agents designed to autonomously execute complex tasks, industry executives said at a recent forum.... Read more

title: The Confluence of Human Judgement and AI in Trading
description: AI is transforming financial markets by enhancing data analysis while preserving essential human judgment. But, can AI takeover trading independently?

title: Life with AI causing human brain 'fry'
description: Heavy users of artificial intelligence report being overwhelmed by trying to keep up with and on top of the technology designed to make their lives easier.

title: AI Smart Glasses Cheating: Students Use Wearable Tech to Beat Exams as Schools Struggle to Stop It
description: AI-powered smart glasses are being used by students to scan exam questions and cheat in real time, exposing major gaps in school enforcement and fairness.
